title: GVH Árfigyelő – Price Monitor
description: Monitor Hungarian GVH Árfigyelő (arfigyelo.gvh.hu) for price drops and new products across Auchan, Tesco, Lidl, Aldi, Spar, Penny. Sends Telegram alerts on changes.

categories.title: Categories to monitor
categories.description: Category slugs from arfigyelo.gvh.hu. Leave empty to monitor ALL categories.

keywords.title: Product keyword filter (optional)
keywords.description: Only include products whose name contains at least one keyword (accent-insensitive).

retailers.title: Retailers to include
retailers.description: Filter by retailer. Leave empty for all.

alert_price_drop_pct.title: Alert: price drop % threshold
alert_price_drop_pct.description: Send alert if price dropped by at least this % since last run. 0 = disabled.

alert_price_below.title: Alert: price below (Ft)
alert_price_below.description: Send alert if current price is below this amount in HUF. 0 = disabled.

alert_new_product.title: Alert: new product in category
alert_new_product.description: Send alert when a product appears for the first time (not seen in previous runs).

delta_mode.title: Delta mode
delta_mode.description: Only process and alert on changes since last run. Disable for full dataset export.

max_items.title: Max products to fetch
max_items.description: Maximum total products to fetch. 0 = unlimited.

telegram_bot_token.title: Telegram bot token
telegram_bot_token.description: Your Telegram bot token (from @BotFather). Required for Telegram alerts.

telegram_chat_id.title: Telegram chat ID
telegram_chat_id.description: Your Telegram chat or group ID. Get it via @userinfobot.

webhook_url.title: Webhook URL (optional)
webhook_url.description: POST results to this URL (Zapier, Make, n8n, etc.)
